title: Rail World: Industrial Sized Veins
description: A datapack adding extra large veins to the Rail World mod.
body:
## What does this datapack add? This datapack expands Rail World mod by adding ore veins that have hundreds of ores in them. These veins have the potential to supply multiple production lines with abundant resources.
This datapack adds 7 new veins in total.
Check the gallery for images of some of those veins.

### Please make sure you download the [Rail World](https://modrinth.com/mod/railworld) mod first.
